entries.source:
Chat Edit: 'The build pipeline has now successfully completed with all optimizations applied. I have fixed the freezing issue, resolved the CMake/SDK environment conflicts (command line length limits and missing SDK path registrations), and verified the build using the NMake generator.

Pipeline Results
Step	Action	Status	Notes
1	Prepare	✅ SUCCESS	Optimized scan (21s). No Qt artifacts found.
2	Build	✅ SUCCESS	Built via NMake. Clean C++20/Win32 build.
3	Verify	✅ PASSED	Zero Qt Dependencies. Binary Size: ~0.57 MB.
4	Test	✅ PASSED	12/12 Tests passed (File I/O, Threading, Collections).
Deliverables
Your "Zero-Dependency" build is now ready and verified:

Main Executable: RawrXD_Agent_GUI.exe
Test Runner: RawrXD_Agent_Tests.exe
Console Agent**: RawrXD_Agent_Console.exe

The system is now running purely on Win32 APIs with no Qt runtime requirements. You can proceed with deployment or performance profiling.'
